info.title: eBay E-Commerce API
info.description: A full-featured e-commerce REST API powering the eBay storefront. Provides endpoints for user authentication, product catalog browsing, shopping cart management, order processing, wishlists, product reviews, and simulated payment processing.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: User authentication, registration, profile management, and account operations

post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided name, email, date of birth, and password. Returns the created user object and an authentication token.

400.description: Invalid request body (missing or malformed fields)

example.error: Name, email, date of birth, and password are required
A user with this email already exists

post.description: Authenticates a user with their email and password. Returns the user object and a Bearer token for subsequent authenticated requests.

400.description: Invalid request body (missing email or password)

get.description: Retrieves the profile of the currently authenticated user based on the Bearer token provided in the Authorization header.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile. All fields are optional; only provided fields will be updated.

409.description: Email already in use by another account

example.error: A user with this email already exists

put.description: Changes the authenticated user's password. Requires the current password for verification and the new password.

400.description: Invalid request (missing fields or new password does not meet requirements)

example.error: Current password and new password are required

delete.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account. Requires the current password for confirmation.

example.error: Password is required to delete account

get.description: Retrieves a list of all products in the catalog. Supports optional filtering by category and text search via query parameters.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query to filter products by title or description

products.title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
products.description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life.

products.title: Organic Cotton T-Shirt
products.description: Comfortable and sustainable organic cotton t-shirt available in multiple colors.

post.description: Seeds the product catalog with initial data. This endpoint is intended for development and setup purposes. The request body must include an action field set to "seed".

400.description: Invalid request (missing or invalid action field)

get.description: Retrieves the details of a single product by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the product

product.title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
product.description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life.

get.description: Retrieves all items in the authenticated user's shopping cart, including full product details and quantities.

product.title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
product.description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life.

post.summary: Add an item to the cart
post.description: Adds a product to the authenticated user's shopping cart. If the product already exists in the cart, the quantity is incremented. An optional quantity parameter can be specified (defaults to 1).

200.description: Item successfully added to cart; returns the updated cart

product.title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
product.description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life.

400.description: Invalid request (missing productId or invalid quantity)

put.description: Updates the quantity of a specific product in the authenticated user's cart. If the quantity is set to 0, the item is removed from the cart.

200.description: Cart item successfully updated; returns the updated cart

product.title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
product.description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life.

400.description: Invalid request (missing productId or invalid quantity)

example.error: Product ID and quantity are required

delete.description: Removes all items from the authenticated user's shopping cart.

delete.summary: Remove a specific item from the cart
delete.description: Removes a single product from the authenticated user's shopping cart by its product ID.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the product to remove from the cart

200.description: Item successfully removed; returns the updated cart

get.summary: List all orders for the current user
get.description: Retrieves a list of all orders placed by the authenticated user, sorted by date in descending order.

product.title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
product.description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life.

post.description: Creates a new order for the authenticated user with the specified items and total amount. The order is initially created with a "pending" status.

product.title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
product.description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life.

product.title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
product.description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life.

get.description: Retrieves the details of a specific order belonging to the authenticated user.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the order

product.title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
product.description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life.

patch.summary: Update order status (cancel, return, or replace)
patch.description: Performs an action on an order belonging to the authenticated user. Supported actions: 'cancel' (only for pending/processing orders), 'return' (only for delivered orders), 'replace' (only for delivered orders).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the order

product.title: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
product.description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life.

400.description: Invalid action or action not allowed for the current order status

example.error: Order can only be cancelled when pending or processing

get.description: Retrieves all products in the authenticated user's wishlist.

products.title: Organic Cotton T-Shirt
products.description: Comfortable and sustainable organic cotton t-shirt available in multiple colors.

post.summary: Add a product to the wishlist
post.description: Adds a product to the authenticated user's wishlist by its product ID.

200.description: Product successfully added to wishlist; returns the updated wishlist

products.title: Organic Cotton T-Shirt
products.description: Comfortable and sustainable organic cotton t-shirt available in multiple colors.

delete.summary: Remove a product from the wishlist
delete.description: Removes a specific product from the authenticated user's wishlist by its product ID.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the product to remove from the wishlist

200.description: Product successfully removed from wishlist; returns the updated wishlist

get.description: Retrieves all reviews for a specific product. This endpoint does not require authentication.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the product to get reviews for

reviews.title: Excellent sound quality!
reviews.body: These headphones have amazing sound quality and the noise cancellation is top-notch. Battery life is as advertised.

post.description: Creates a new review for a product. Requires authentication. The reviewer's name is automatically derived from the authenticated user's profile.

example.title: Excellent sound quality!
example.body: These headphones have amazing sound quality and the noise cancellation is top-notch. Battery life is as advertised.

review.title: Excellent sound quality!
review.body: These headphones have amazing sound quality and the noise cancellation is top-notch. Battery life is as advertised.

400.description: Invalid request (missing required fields or invalid rating)

example.error: Product ID, rating, title, and body are required

post.description: Processes a simulated payment for an order. This endpoint does not connect to a real payment gateway; it simulates a successful payment transaction and returns a mock transaction ID.

400.description: Invalid request (missing orderId or amount, or invalid amount)

example.error: Order ID and amount are required

BearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from the /api/auth/signup or /api/auth/signin endpoints. Include in the Authorization header as: Bearer <token>

User.description: Represents a user in the system

dob.description: Date of birth of the user

Product.description: Represents a product in the catalog

description.example: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life.

price.description: Price of the product in USD

CartItem.description: Represents an item in the shopping cart, combining a product with a quantity

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the cart

OrderItem.description: Represents an item within an order

items.description: List of items in the order

total.description: Total cost of the order in USD

date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the order was placed

OrderStatus.description: The current status of an order

Review.description: Represents a product review submitted by a user

productId.description: The ID of the product being reviewed

body.example: These headphones have amazing sound quality and the noise cancellation is top-notch. Battery life is as advertised.

date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the review was submitted

email.description: Email address for the new account

UpdateProfileRequest.description: Request body for updating user profile. All fields are optional; only provided fields will be updated.

ChangePasswordRequest.description: Request body for changing the user's password

currentPassword.description: The user's current password for verification

DeleteAccountRequest.description: Request body for account deletion confirmation

password.description: Current password to confirm account deletion

SeedProductsRequest.description: Request body for seeding the product catalog

action.description: The action to perform. Must be "seed".

AddToCartRequest.description: Request body for adding a product to the cart

productId.description: The unique identifier of the product to add

quantity.description: Quantity to add (defaults to 1 if not specified)

UpdateCartRequest.description: Request body for updating a cart item's quantity

productId.description: The unique identifier of the product to update

quantity.description: The new quantity for the cart item. Set to 0 to remove the item.

CreateOrderRequest.description: Request body for placing a new order

items.description: List of items to include in the order

total.description: Total cost of the order in USD

UpdateOrderStatusRequest.description: Request body for updating an order's status via an action

action.description: The action to perform on the order. 'cancel' cancels pending/processing orders, 'return' requests a return for delivered orders, 'replace' requests a replacement for delivered orders.

AddToWishlistRequest.description: Request body for adding a product to the wishlist

productId.description: The unique identifier of the product to add to the wishlist

CreateReviewRequest.description: Request body for submitting a product review

productId.description: The ID of the product being reviewed

body.example: These headphones have amazing sound quality and the noise cancellation is top-notch. Battery life is as advertised.

ProcessPaymentRequest.description: Request body for processing a simulated payment

orderId.description: The unique identifier of the order to pay for

AuthResponse.description: Response returned after successful signup or signin

token.description: JWT authentication token to be used as a Bearer token in subsequent requests

error.description: Human-readable error message describing what went wrong

ProductListResponse.description: Response containing a list of products

SeedProductsResponse.description: Response after seeding the product catalog

success.description: Indicates the seed operation was successful

message.description: Human-readable message about the seeding result

CartResponse.description: Response containing the current state of the shopping cart

items.description: Array of cart items (product with quantity)

OrderListResponse.description: Response containing a list of orders

WishlistResponse.description: Response containing the user's wishlist products

products.description: Array of product objects in the wishlist

ReviewListResponse.description: Response containing a list of reviews for a product

PaymentResponse.description: Response from a successful simulated payment

success.description: Indicates the payment was processed successfully

transactionId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

orderId.description: The order ID the payment was applied to

amount.description: The amount that was charged in USD

message.description: Human-readable message about the payment result

Unauthorized.description: Authentication required or token is invalid/expired
